name: Pakasai Country Club
verification_notes: 18H / par 72 confirmed across multiple golf aggregators — no dispute.
Green fee 2,500 THB foreigner rate: provisional single-source from aggregator; no official website to cross-check. No weekend differential found — publishing same rate for both.

Caddie 300 THB and cart 500 THB: provisional estimates consistent with southern Thailand resort pricing. Caddie required inferred from tourism context (all comparable resort courses in the region mandate caddie).
No confirmed phone number or official website found. Page would show contact-by-search note.
GPS (8.0953, 98.9072) is a model estimate for the Krabi town area — actual course is off Route 4, approximately 8 km north-west of Krabi town.
Club rental assumed available given tourist-oriented positioning; fee unknown.
Designer unknown — not found in any source.
data_gaps: Green fee — single source only; call to confirm
publish_recommendation: PUBLISH_WITH_PROVISIONAL — Pakasai is the only 18H course in Krabi province and well-documented as tourist-facing. Green fees and caddie/cart are provisional but within the expected range for the region. Standard approval question on the fee figure.
